notices: This is a tracked draft field-map review artifact only.
This does not replace human visual review, source freshness review, or counsel confirmation.
Do not wire this artifact to live routes.
sourcePdfRole: blank official source PDF from local Nationwide archive

reviewerNotes: Red field rectangles generally align with the visual blanks and checkboxes across the form.
Red labels are noisy, but placement is usable for draft mapping.
Signature fields show /s/ appearance artifacts that need careful handling before any real fill/render.
Unknown fields remain high, so canonical field naming still needs manual review.

risks: Status remains visual_review_required; no lifecycle promotion is implied.
Canonical field names are mostly unresolved because low and unknown confidence candidates remain high.
AcroForm field names include generic names and may not be safe semantic keys.
Signature fields may render /s/ artifacts and need explicit handling before fill/render work.
Draft rectangles need full human visual review against filled test data before any production use.
